text:
his disposition in Lagna, the
4th, 5th, 7th, 9th or 10th, will fortify him to the extent of
making him a yogakaraka. The native will be enabled to
earn considerable fortune through business or other
occupations consistent with the nature of the 2nd lord and
2nd house. Depending upon the nature of the aspects cast
on the 2nd lord by malefic planets, the native will sustain
losses. An affliction to the 2nd lord may also express itself
in the shape of the subject not getting nutritious and
delicious food, or his family and children suffering from
constant diseases, or want of cordial relations between the
native and his life-partner.
In the Third House.—Brave, intelligent, good-natured
but depraved character. Atheistic tendencies will be
rampant and he becomes addicted to luxuries. Later in life
he turns out to be a miser.
When the 2nd lord in the 3rd is well fortified, he will
be benefited by his sisters. He will benefit by learning fine
arts, viz., music and dancing.
